name: download_document
description: Download a completed document as a PDF file. The document must be in completed status with all signatures collected. Returns the binary PDF content.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique ID of the document to download.

parameters.name: watermark_text
parameters.description: Optional watermark text to overlay on the PDF.

parameters.name: separate_files
parameters.description: If true and the document has attachments, return a zip file with the document and attachments separately.
